sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91339" key="pue/lion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠέλ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πύελος</foreign>: prov., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀστραπὴ ἐκ πυελίου</foreign> 'when pigs begin to fly', <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0097.tlg001:3:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diogenian.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
